name: webapp
description: Full-stack web application: FastAPI + Next.js + app-local SQLite + Docker

variables.origin_host: VPS IP or hostname that CloudFront proxies to (e.g., 203.0.113.10)
variables.origin_ip: VPS origin IP address for direct access verification (e.g., 203.0.113.10)
variables.ssh_user: DEPRECATED: Workflows use ${{ secrets.PROJECT_SSH_USER }} instead. Only used in DEPLOY.md for manual SSH commands.
variables.aws_account_id: AWS account ID (filled after first deploy)
variables.cloudfront_id: CloudFront distribution ID (filled after first deploy)
variables.cloudfront_domain: CloudFront domain name (filled after first deploy)
variables.hosted_zone_id: Route 53 hosted zone ID (from DB site/domain settings or filled after deploy)
variables.certificate_arn: ACM certificate ARN (from DB site/domain settings or filled after deploy)
variables.domain_txt_records: Rendered from DB site/domain settings domains[].txt_records. Optional domain ownership TXT records such as workspace verification codes; domain stack owns them when present, otherwise infra does.
variables.domain: Project domain for hostname-based environment URLs (e.g., example.com). Used for ephemeral ({slug}.domain) and preview ({name}.domain) environments.
variables.vps_description: VPS provider and OS description (e.g., DigitalOcean, Ubuntu 24.04, nginx + ufw)
variables.stacks: DB site settings pulumi.stacks list of Pulumi stacks this project instantiates (subset of infra/vps/domain). Absent = the default [infra, vps] full-webapp pair; a DNS-only project declares [domain].
variables.import_zone_id: Domain stack only (DB site/domain hosted_zone_id -> importZoneId). Existing Route 53 hosted-zone id to ADOPT instead of creating a new zone — set this when the domain was registered through Route 53 (which auto-creates a zone) so `pulumi up` adopts it rather than making a duplicate. Empty = create a fresh zone.
variables.manage_registration: Domain stack only. false (default) = manage the hosted zone but leave the registration to the operator console purchase; true = also manage the already-registered domain (name servers + auto-renew) via Pulumi.
